programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: The F4 guys have moved on to college while Jan Di has entered her senior year of high school. She has not heard from Jun Pyo since he left.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di waits to hear the conclusions of F3's meeting with Jun-pyo, and can tell from their look that it was not good.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: After treating Jan Di in a cruel manner, Mr. Jung prepares everything so that Jun-Pyo can visit her in Seoul. Will he be able to go without Madam Kang finding out?

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's family hears about Jun-pyo's engagement and asks her miserably if it's true.

programme.title: Harada: Sculpting for Peace
programme.desc: France, summer 2019. The Japanese artist Tetsuo Harada has just turned 70 years old. He has spent his life carving works for peace and respect for nature in his 3000 m² workshop. He works tirelessly on new projects.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Ji-hoo can see how hurt Jan Di is by the kiss, and continues to follow her as she stumbles around in shock.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begins seeing Jae-Kyung in a new light, like he's seeing her for the first time as a potential friend -- or maybe a kindred spirit.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Woo-bin tries to talk some sense into Yi-jung, who is determined to drink himself into a stupor.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: At home, Jun-hee reminisces about how her mother meddled in her life, in much the same way she's interfering in Jun-pyo's now.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.desc: Yi-jung is waiting outside for Eun-jae, excited to see her -- until he listens in on her phone conversation; from her words, it sounds like a call to a boyfriend.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo begs for Jan Di to advise him not to get married.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo tells Jan Di that he'll protect her, but to Jun-pyo's surprise, she says that she does not want to be cosseted or taken care of.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Perhaps feeling it's time to expose one truth, Mr. Jung leads Jun-hee to the unknown patient's bedside; at the sight of her father, Jun-hee breaks down.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun-pyo asks Yumi to make the lunchbox once more, confirming that Yumi had taken credit for her lunch.

programme.title: Dancing Cat

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Just being rich isn't enough to endure the teen oppression at Shinhwa -- loners are often marked as targets by the bored über-clique called F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A wicked rumor is spread on the Internet that a second-year student at Shinhwa High School is pregnant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Making a rash choice, Jan Di tells her mother she has to go somewhere and runs off, heading toward Namsan Tower.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's bike is set ablaze while she is attacked with water balloons and blasted with a fire extinguisher.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A psychic foresees that Jan Di will be losing something significant.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jun Pyo intends to expel his best friend and Jan Di out of Shinhwa High School -- and out of F4.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di dashes to the hospital after being informed that Jun Pyo had been in an accident.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Yi-jung gets a frantic call from his mother threatening to commit suicide because of his father.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: A note indicates that class has been moved to the science lab. The lab is unoccupied, but Jan Di waits, not realizing that the room is filling with fumes.

programme.title: Boys Over Flowers
programme.desc: Jan Di's father gets kidnapped by loan sharks, which inevitably forces Jan Di's mother to swallow her pride and plead for Madam Kang's help.

programme.desc: Terror awaits some friends after they meet a dangerous young woman from a Los Angeles cult.

programme.desc: A crook on the run cons his way into a dinner party whose host is anything but ordinary.

programme.desc: After giving birth to her first child, a woman (Clémence Poésy) starts to believe that her downstairs neighbors have sinister intentions.

programme.title: Amulet
programme.desc: Terror strikes when a former soldier takes a job to help a young woman and her housebound mother.

programme.desc: A vacationing couple and an escaped convict become trapped by a voracious parasite that devours its victims from the inside out.

programme.desc: After he kills a detective, a con artist (Viggo Mortensen) and his wife (Kirsten Dunst) must trust a potentially dangerous stranger (Oscar Isaac) to help them get out of Greece.

programme.title: Shuttle

programme.desc: A young man and his younger siblings who have concealed the death of their mother to remain together are plagued by a sinister presence in their home.

programme.desc: An Iraq War veteran (Tom Hardy) finds himself on a collision course with his estranged brother (Joel Edgerton) when both set their sights on winning a tournament in mixed martial arts.

programme.title: Primal
programme.desc: Hunter and collector Frank Walsh sails to America with a priceless white jaguar and a dangerous political assassin. When the prisoner manages to break free, Walsh must utilize his expert skills to capture the dangerous killer -- not dead, but alive.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: A man teams up with his ex-military brothers and a detective to save his kidnapped fiancee from human traffickers.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: A security guard (Liam Hemsworth) and his childhood pal (Michael Angarano) make plans to rob an armored car.

programme.title: Highlander II: Renegade Version
programme.desc: Immortal Scottish swordsmen (Christopher Lambert, Sean Connery) from another planet return, this time with an environmental terrorist (Virginia Madsen).

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: A discovery made by a kung fu obsessed American teen sends him on an adventure to China, where he joins up with a band of martial arts warriors in order to free the imprisoned Monkey King.

programme.title: Tekken
programme.desc: Jin (Jon Foo) trains to fight Anvil after he witnesses him murdering his mother.

programme.title: The King of Fighters
programme.desc: Members of three legendary clans fight battles in other dimensions.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: A 13-year-old clairvoyant (Dakota Fanning) and the son (Chris Evans) of a murdered assassin join forces against a covert government agency that dabbles in psychic drugs and warfare.

programme.title: JCVD
programme.desc: Weary action star Jean-Claude Van Damme (Jean-Claude Van Damme) returns to Belgium to find relief from his troubles but instead stumbles into a bank robbery.

programme.title: Sharknado: Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Investigating how the "Sharknado" franchise of movies became a phenomenon.

programme.title: BloodRayne
programme.desc: A vampire hybrid joins the fight against the evil bloodsucker who sired her.

programme.title: BloodRayne 2: Deliverance
programme.desc: Beautiful Rayne (Natassia Malthe) teams with demon hunters to save a Western town from a gang of vampiric cowboys led by Billy the Kid (Zack Ward).

programme.title: BloodRayne: The Third Reich
programme.desc: Half-vampire, half-human Rayne must stop a Nazi official and his army of walking dead before they can carry out their plan to make Hitler immortal.

programme.title: Route 666
programme.desc: Two federal agents (Lou Diamond Phillips, Lori Petty) encounter zombies on a desert highway years after the massacre of a chain gang.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: A Chicago police detective (Chuck Norris) attacks a cocaine warehouse with a remote-controlled item called the Prowler.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman who's in Bangkok to pull off a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman and bonds with his errand boy.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A veteran detective and a rookie cop have to stop a master thief's computer virus before it drains all the funds from a bank's accounts.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Joey, an alcoholic war veteran assumes a new identity after returning from a traumatic tour in Afghanistan and becomes a vigilante in a bid to atone for his sins.
A desperate man takes part in an underworld game of Russian roulette in which gamblers place bets on who will survive.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: The life story of Yip Man, the first person to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun.

programme.title: Ip Man 2: Legend of the Grandmaster
programme.desc: Wing Chun martial arts master Ip Man moves to Hong Kong to create a school where he can teach his fighting techniques to a new generation. Instead, he's drawn into a showdown with a merciless boxer known as the Twister.

programme.title: Sharknado 2: The Second One
programme.desc: A freak weather system turns its deadly fury on New York City, unleashing a Sharknado on the population and its most cherished, iconic sites - and only Fin and April can save the Big Apple.

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two guys (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) and a girl (Melody Anderson) brave jungle hazards to find an Aztec temple filled with gold.

programme.title: Decommissioned
programme.desc: A retired agent discovers a plot to kill the president, and he's the patsy.

programme.desc: An FBI agent (Craig Sheffer) pursues his former mentor (Steven Seagal), a vengeful colonel who's waging a one-man war against criminals.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto está furioso con Ezequiel y para vengarse buscará dañar lo más preciado para él. Julia es engañada por el hijo de Fausto y la utiliza para llegar a su padre. El padre de Julia golpea terriblemente a Gregorio por haberle mentido a Julia.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se ve involucrada con El Doliente. Los Aragón secuestran a Julia. Camila descubre que Rosa Blanco no era su mamá y la estafó con el dinero. Fausto va a vengarse con Julia después de que Ezequiel golpeara a su hijo Gregorio.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Julia se encuentra en grave peligro después del secuestro orquestado por los Aragón. Camila está llena de dudas acerca de quién fue su madre, por las fotos que mandó El Doliente. Max enfrenta a Fausto para que regrese a Julia sana y salva.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Astrid considera a Fernando un cobarde. El secuestro de Julia se le va de las manos a Fausto. Gregorio se enfrenta a sus primos para poder salvar a Julia. Marcos se escapa con Julia y Ezequiel secuestra a Gregorio para intercambiarlo por Julia.

programme.title: Piel salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel está dispuesto a llegar hasta las últimas consecuencias para rescatar a Julia. Camila por fin descubre su pasado, pero no quiere que Max lo sepa. Julia por fin regresa al lado de su familia pero Ezequiel asesinó a Marcos.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Paolo cuestiona a François. Rodrigo trata de hacer su pesquisa para saber quién sabe la verdadera identidad de Aurora. Rodrigo atropella al investigador que puede estropear sus planes.

programme.title: Carita pintada
programme.desc: Tadeo plantea a Irene la posibilidad de que Aurora la rechace. Irene sale a cenar con Candela y le cuenta la hipótesis de que Aurora es su hija. François le miente una vez más a Alberto.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: Pandora sabe que Olimpia fue quien tiró por la ventana a Felipe pero aún lo mantiene en secreto. Olimpia tiene que resolver la situación antes de que todo se descubra.

programme.title: Mi gorda bella
programme.desc: El hijo de Olimpia, Aquiles, enfrenta a Valentina diciéndole que su mamá no es mala persona. Por otro lado, Olimpia quiere saber dónde está Pandora.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen
programme.desc: Desireé se entera que Juana es la mamá del bebé de Mauricio. Carlota le pide ayuda a Rogelio para recuperar a Mauricio. Mauricio invita a Juana a pasar el día de su cumpleaños en la casa de la montaña, ahí planea revelarle toda la verdad.

programme.title: Juana, la virgen

programme.desc: Hernando y Rodrigo conversan con Salomé y ella comenta que es la esposa de Jorge de la Rosa.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Mediterranean Grilled Filets and Salt Crusted Halibut
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern elevates California halibut, first with grilled fillets on saffron labneh with romesco and roasted cabbage. Then, he demonstrates a classic salt-crusted whole halibut, served with whole roasted cauliflower and a rich cream sauce.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Wild Boar Feast: Chorizo with Mussels and Whole Roasted Leg
programme.desc: Wild boar takes center stage! Andrew makes chorizo with mussels, preserved lemon & white wine. Then, he slow-roasts a whole leg over fire, served Southern-style with pickled cherries, glazed onions & mustard sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah make their twists on some L.A. outdoor classics: Backyard Burgers 2 Ways; Pit-Smoked Pollo Asado; Grilled Mexican Street Corn and Bacon-Wrapped Danger Dogs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are making brisket 3 ways! They're pit-smoking a classic Texas brisket; showing you how to gussy up a pot of Brisket Baked Beans; and making a charcoal-grilled Vietnamese Brisket Noodle Bowl with all the fixings.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Beef Shank is the New Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking a humungous Thor's Hammer; cooking up some Catfish & Eggs for breakfast; making a Grilled Salsa Verde; and putting on a pot of Mezcal Charro Beans.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern goes primal with two antelope dishes: a Greek-style whole leg roasted over the open fire with a lemony avgolemono sauce and crispy potatoes, and a simple antelope tenderloin carpaccio served with roasted tomatoes and parmesan.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern starts simmering a classic Italian Bolognese sauce, with ground bison, lots of red wine and tomatoes. Then, he adds marinated bison skirt steak tacos with borracho beans to the tailgate menu.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern shares his favorite way to prepare wild turkey breast, pan-fried over an open fire. Served with cheese sauce and jalapeno-bacon wild rice. Then, cooks a simple meal of seared salmon and a side of crispy potatoes and onions.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern breaks down a whole rabbit to grill with a spicy, Sichuan sauce and plate with panzanella.

programme.title: Andrew Zimmern's Wild Game Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Grilled Clams Casino and Garlicky Clam Pizza
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern celebrates cherrystone clams with two show-stopping recipes. He prepares classic grilled clams casino with pancetta, then pushes boundaries with an innovative grilled pizza topped with clams, garlic, chiles, and cheese.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie explores his Italian roots, pairing each pasta shape with its perfect sauce-from Cavatelli with Super Green Sauce to Pappardelle in pork ragout, ricotta Gnocchi with punchy anchovy pecorino, and cozy Squash Orzotto with bloomed poppy seeds.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie fires up a steakhouse-style spread with Italian flair from golden beets and buttery mushrooms to a sizzling Bistecca alla Fiorentina steak with salmoriglio sauce, and a smooth cold brew affogato granita.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie reunites his old band for a jam session and a spin on a college-era classic - featuring Shoyu Ramen with Tare Eggs, sweet and savory Chicken Meatballs, Seaweed Cucumber Salad, and a crispy Okonomiyaki pancake.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie makes pizza magic with two incredible doughs, turning his kitchen into a pizza party with grilled sausage pizza, cheesy Grandma Pies, golden Panzerotti, and a sweet dessert pizza topped with ricotta, berries, and honey.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.sub-title: Pancake Stacks and Snacks for Two
programme.desc: Frankie flips the script for his wife Heather making breakfast for dinner featuring Banana Maple Pancakes, Eggs Benedict with prosciutto cotto, Home Fries with Bloody Mary Ketchup, Sausage Scrapple, and a boozy Espresso Milkshake.

programme.title: Let Frankie Cook
programme.desc: Frankie fuels up for action making hot Oatmeal, and Energy Date Balls, before he cooks up the perfect post-ride feast of cheesy Juicy Lucy Burgers, Ramp-loaded pasta salad, and a maple ginger switchel to cool it all down.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Crispy Pork Noodles and Cheesy Chard Cannelloni
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates rhubarb in a lip-smacking sauce, heroes spinach in a silky goat's cheese risotto and marries vibrant basil with chard in a crowd-pleasing cheesy spring cannelloni.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Spring Onion Chicken Curry and Sausage Broccoli Pizza
programme.desc: Jamie elevates asparagus spears for a fishy feat, makes spring onions the star of the show in his spicy green chicken curry and gives purple sprouting broccoli an Italian-inspired makeover.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Salmon Celebration and Almond Custard Tart
programme.desc: Jamie snazzes up some spuds with wild garlic pesto, creates a broad bean mezze, rustles up a beautiful spring salad and honours rhubarb in a luscious custard tart with almond brittle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Stove Top Pizza with Caramelized Onions and Peppers
programme.desc: Jamie makes super-simple stuffed chicken thighs and a pizza that doesn't need the oven on. He turns the humble pancake into a showstopping stack of spinach, ham and cheesey gorgeousness.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates the one dish wonder of a casserole with a Cajun chicken tray bake and a vegetable lasagna.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Time Saving Take Out at Home
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up some versatile meatball kebabs, delicious crispy pork noodles, a magnificent carrot puff pastry and a humble crumble, all for under a buck per serving.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a giant Yorkshire pudding with stuffing and roast veg, cheesy gnocchi with bacon, spicy kipper kedgeree, and easy ice cream, all for under a buck a plate.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates frozen ingredients to create a scrumptious fish pie, creamy cauliflower cheese spaghetti and a warming minestrone soup, all for under a buck per plate.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Barbecue Chicken, Roast Potatoes and Corn
programme.desc: Jamie takes root veg to another level, makes scrumptious sticky BBQ chicken and turns things upside down with a pineapple cake.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to a picturesque cattle farm in California's Santa Maria Valley, to hear firsthand from a young pitmaster who has uncovered the secrets of real Santa Maria barbecue.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Legend of Louis Mueller's Dino Beef Ribs
programme.desc: Pat visits his close friend Wayne Mueller, third-generation pitmaster of Louis Mueller's BBQ, to learn the ins and outs of his famous dino beef ribs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Secret to Texas-Style Smoked Brisket
programme.desc: Pat and his buddy Leonard Botello use the flavors of the beloved native Post Oak to smoke a perfect Central Texas-style beef brisket.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Pit-Cooked Chicken with Alabama White Sauce
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Decatur, Alabama to visit a storied institution of barbecue - Big Bob Gibson's. There, he learns the ins, the outs, and the history of a regional delicacy: pit-cooked chicken with Alabama white sauce.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin teams up with fellow pitmasters to showcase the rugged and nuanced tradition of whole-hog cooking, West Tennessee-style.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Catching Gulf Coast Redfish and Blue Crabs
programme.desc: Pat visits Houston to go Gulf Bay fishing with chef Chris Shepherd, hoping to catch some redfish and gather a side of blue crabs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat visits Edgar Victoria, known for bringing the street foods of Mexico City to Nashville, to do some live fire cooking out in nature as they prepare one of his favorite dishes - skirt steak tlayuda.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat travels to the Emerald Coast of Destin, Florida, to join his friend Adam Evans on a spearfishing adventure, sourcing fresh fish to cook over live fire.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Bluefin Tuna Collars with Chili Pickle Relish
programme.desc: Pat Martin visits chef Adam Perry Lang in Los Angeles, where the pair cook a prized catch castoff cut - Bluefin Tuna collars.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat meets the trio behind Blood Bros BBQ to discover how three childhood friends seamlessly blended their Asian-American culture with the Texas barbecue traditions they grew up with.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: Discovering Indian Lamb Kebabs in Nashville
programme.desc: Pat grills riverside with renowned chef Vivek Surti, crafting lamb mamna and chicken kebabs inspired by his Indian heritage.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat fishes the coastal inlets of Charleston, South Carolina, in search of a delicious sheepshead, which he plans to grill with his friend and chef James London.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.desc: Pat Martin travels to Gainesboro, Tennessee to visit a free-range hog farm, learn about their operations, and grill up a less desired, but no less delicious, cut of hog - pork steaks.

programme.title: Barbecue: Life of Fire
programme.sub-title: The Roscoe Family Legacy: Alabama Pit Ribs
programme.desc: Pat heads to Birmingham to team up with artist and chef Roscoe Hall, cooking ribs inspired by Roscoe's family legacy.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: These Smoked Turkey Legs are better than the State Fair
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah smoke up some State Fair Turkey Legs; fry some skillet Chorizo & Eggs; smoke-and-fry some Buffalo Rib Tips; and cook up some Sriracha and Garlic-Butter Grilled Shrimp.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: Why LA's Danger Dog is the Best Thing You'll Ever Eat
programme.desc: Kevin & Noah make their twists on some L.A. outdoor classics: Backyard Burgers 2 Ways; Pit-Smoked Pollo Asado; Grilled Mexican Street Corn and Bacon-Wrapped Danger Dogs.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Only Pulled Pork Recipe You'll Ever Need
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking up some BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwiches with Coleslaw; frying up a skillet of Creole Cabbage; and charcoal-grilling some Steak Sandwiches with Chimichurri Mayo.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out
programme.sub-title: The Secret to World-Class Texas Brisket
programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are making brisket 3 ways! They're pit-smoking a classic Texas brisket; showing you how to gussy up a pot of Brisket Baked Beans; and making a charcoal-grilled Vietnamese Brisket Noodle Bowl with all the fixings.

programme.title: Barbecue: Smoke Out

programme.desc: Kevin and Noah are smoking a humungous Thor's Hammer; cooking up some Catfish & Eggs for breakfast; making a Grilled Salsa Verde; and putting on a pot of Mezcal Charro Beans.

programme.desc: Doug and Nicole are searching for a new luxury home in Los Angeles, California. They need a house that's closer to their clients. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A striking modern home has been built out of flint, and then to Switzerland to see a sleek glass residence next to a scenic lake. Deep In the woods in New York State, a far-from-average tree house that serves as a dream getaway for a family of five.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: Venture into the Spanish countryside to explore an enchanting villa. A cliffside retreat that is ultra-modern. In rural Quebec, a cabin that resembles a pair of binoculars perched on a cliff, and finally a woodland retreat in Portugal.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet Steven. He is looking for a place to spend his weekends that will accommodate his love of Motor Sports. Viviana is taking him through some of the most desirable properties in this one-of-a-kind Motor Sports Country Club.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet John and Laura, a couple who are in search of a family escape luxury home. Viviana takes them through some of the most beautiful mega mansions in Montecito, California.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: We meet married couple Henri and Chris who are in search of a luxury desert home. They need a house with the modern conveniences and a house to entertain at.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.sub-title: A Backyard Fit For A Millionaire
programme.desc: Doug and Nicole are searching for a new luxury home in Los Angeles, California. They need a house that's closer to their clients. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Steve and Tanya are Realtors who just bought their forever home a few doors down from Tanya's parents. To complete their dream home, Brian and Sarah build a dream cottage retreat in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Medical doctors and busy parents, Cynthia and Boon miss their camping adventures. Brian and Sarah perform some backyard surgery, and build them a cozy campground retreat so they can go straight from the ER to getting some R&R right in their own yard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Janet's love for her nine grandkids is endless. But so is the chaos they bring inside her home when they come visit. To take that energy outside, Brian and Sarah build a fun kid-zone in the backyard, but also a sophisticated adult area for Janet.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Paris lovers, Louise and Rick, want to share their European enthusiasm with their two daughters without racking up the mileage. Brian and Sarah build them a French-inspired urban escape. It's Paris in their backyard! C'est magnifique!

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ex-city slickers, Lauren and Mark, miss their friends and family from the city. Brian and Sarah create a country retreat with an outdoor pad, indoor dining lounge, and a chicken coop. When Lauren and Mark's friends visit, they'll never want to leave.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Mom and son duo, Paul and Catharine, are overwhelmed by Paul's multi-level backyard. Paul also finds his current indoor fitness regime frustrating. Brian and Sarah muscle up to the challenge by building a gym in his backyard, alongside a hot tub.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Dave and Jorge love art and entertaining, but with tenants in their basement and no creative space inside, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into a creative party lounge and build a shipping container-inspired structure for an industrial feel.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Since having two kids, Sonia and Peter have resorted to staycations at home, but their backyard is a headache. Brian and Sarah create a luxury vacation destination that includes a pool, spa, outdoor kitchen and a stunning four-season structure.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Cool parents, Michelle and Adrian, are passionate about music and events. Brian and Sarah tune into their needs and amp up their boring backyard with a DJ den, a creative arts-and-crafts wall, and hang-out zones for family jam sessions.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah create a backyard for Pam & Kevin that matches their lush forest surrounding complete with a double wrap around deck and a hot tub. The team also build a workshop for Kevin to perfect his craft of leather tooling.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Breanna & Nick's life revolves around socializing and physical activity. Brian and Sarah convert an old, underused shed into a beautiful, zen'd out yoga studio and create backyard partying, lounging and dining areas.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Aarati & Dave both work from home, forcing their living room to be a triple duty working/living/childrens' play area. Brian and Sarah create a flexible structure, install a sleek and sophisticated plunge pool, and create an outdoor fireplace lounge.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Carly & Nate's social media star dog, Dean the Basset Hound, has a lot of four-legged friends visiting, leaving the home feeling cramped. Brian and Sarah make a bar/lounge for pet and owner gatherings, along with a stylish outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sonia & Paul are big social connectors in their community with a constant flow of visitors. Brian and Sarah turn their barren backyard into a social hotspot, complete with sunroom, giant chessboard, waterfall and stylish outdoor entertainment spaces.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Amy & Terry love nothing more than spending time outside with their daughters. Brian and Sarah build a dream enclosure to hang out in on summer nights, with a swimming pool change room and a new deck where Terry can grill.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: France & Marc's home is being outgrown by their sport-obsessed sons and provides no inspiring space for France to work from home. Brian and Sarah convert a rundown garage into a spot where France can work and carved out safe sports areas.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit Italy - the birthplace of western civilization and home to two incredible hotels set against some of this country's most stunning backdrops which embody the very best of their own regional history and culture.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: Today we have two different hotel experiences in the bustling country of Japan. Hotels that combine elements of past and present Japan to create a sophisticated and luxurious experience in the heart of the city.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit two hotels that have utilized their desert location in the United Arab Emirates to offer guests unique stays found in a few places in the world.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We're in Northern Europe where two hotels have used their extreme locations and extreme temperatures to offer guests experiences that can only be found in a few places on Earth.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: In Thailand, are the Anantara Golden Triangle and Elephant Camp Resort. Attracting guests who desire luxury and adventure. In the Philippines lies Villa Escudero Plantation and Resort. This picturesque and tranquil Villa is brimming with character.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit the United Kingdom, a nation recognized for its rich history and classic regal elegance, and two hotels that embody the very best of these values despite very different locations.

programme.title: World's Most Incredible Hotels
programme.desc: We visit the vast continent of the USA. From the hustle and bustle of the east to the relaxed, atmospheric west, two contrasting hotels offer an American adventure with a difference.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chef Nadiya Hussain shows Fred the culinary sights of Yorkshire including Bettys' iconic tea and cakes, a rural Wensleydale cheese farm and shop, and a small restaurant which serves home made samosas, Nadiya's favourite spicy Indian snack.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Chris Bavin takes Fred to the New Forest, where fresh local produce is king. Featuring wood-fired cooking, pork pies and a country pub serving the perfect Ploughman's.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Perfecting Puff Pastry in Burgundy, France
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Caines takes Fred to Burgundy to amazing places to eat serving the finest French country cooking and exquisite patisserie.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Master Pasta Maker of Puglia, Italy
programme.desc: TV and radio host Dermot O'Leary takes Fred Sirieix to Puglia in Italy's deep South to his favourite restaurants showcasing simple but sublime cucina povera or poor man's cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Exploring Castles and Cozy Inns in South Wales, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Top chefs in England take Fred Sirieix to experience amazing restaurants where they genuinely love to eat.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Searching for the Best Pizza in Rome, Italy
programme.desc: Chef Giorgio Locatelli takes Fred to Rome in search of the city's most exciting eats. Sublime pasta, fluffy gnocchi and the world's best pizza all delicious but affordable.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: The Floating Restaurant of Devon, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Fred travels to South Devon with chef and restauranteur Angela Hartnett. From Angela's all-time favourite restaurant in Dartmouth to an incredible floating cafe on the River Exe.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.sub-title: Baking Artisinal Pastries in Mallorca, Spain
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road, Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lover's paradise, and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.

programme.sub-title: The PERFECT Turkey Hunt - Off The ROOST in Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Join Gavin as he heads afield in Pennsylvania to chase gobblers. He finds himself in the middle of a perfect off the roost hunt that was captured beautifully.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The story of a true old school deer camp meeting new world management practices to take a raw piece of hunting land and develop it into whitetail Mecca.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: ORIGINAL CONTENT - Michael Pitts and Anthony Virga join Realtree Spring Thunder producer Matt Garger to turkey hunt on his home turf in New York's Adirondack Mountains.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Highlighting the stories and people who have made the shooting sports and hunting lifestyle a part of their lives.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting TV
programme.desc: Knowing when to spot and stalk is crucial for any hunter. In this episode of DDH-TV, Mark Kayser breaks down three key factors for success, while Dan Schmidt puts them into action as he stalks a buck in Nebraskas Sandhills.

programme.title: Mark Peterson's The Journey Within
programme.desc: On day three of Mark Peterson's South America Upland Slam, the team is snowed in while waiting for better weather in La Pampa. Once cleared to fly, they arrive and head straight to the field.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Joining Denny McMahan at the Thumbtack Ranch in South Texas; after dedicating his life to service in the U.S. Army and law enforcement, he now continues the mission by teaching at the police academy; Denny is a hero in his community.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: Slade and the old Trained Assassins (TAT) crew head to Montrose, Colo., where they meet up with Slade's dad, Bear Cub, TJ, and George for a heck of a week at Elk Camp.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.sub-title: Opening Week in Mississippi Started Off With a Bang!!
programme.desc: Host and real estate agent, Slade Priest, educates on everything from purchasing and flipping hunting properties, to improving existing ones.

programme.title: LBP Spotlight
programme.desc: TA Mahoney is a classic mom-and-pop store known for going the extra mile and treating everyday people like family; keep an eye on Mike though, you never know what kind of prank is up his sleeve.

programme.title: Finding Answers
programme.desc: Jason Stoogenke leads a team of investigative reporters to expose scams, rip-offs and other consumer issues.

programme.title: Clark Howard's Ways to Save
programme.desc: Consumer Adviser Clark Howard has you covered with ways to save and keep your money safe; Clark shows you steps to protect your money from scammers, old debts and pricey student loans.

programme.title: Hot Topics
programme.desc: Hosted by Heather Catlin, Hot Topics wraps up the week's most talked-about stories from across America.

programme.title: All For America
programme.desc: Stories of everyday heroes and acts of kindness that often go unnoticed.

programme.title: Destinations Discovered
programme.desc: Join us as we uncover hidden gems and unforgettable experiences across the Southeast.
